Kql: let a = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ]; let b = a | summarize count() by k; let c = b | extend count_ = count_ * 2; c | join kind=inner (a) on k | project k, count_, v | sort by k asc, v asc
Sql: WITH a AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), b AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM a GROUP BY ALL), c AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, count_ * 2 AS count_ FROM b) SELECT k, count_, v FROM (SELECT L.*, R.* RENAME (k AS k1) FROM c AS L INNER JOIN a AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST, v ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let base = datatable(i:int, l:long)[ -5,-5, 0,0, 3,2147483648 ]; let step1 = base | extend ["select"] = i + 1; let step2 = step1 | extend ["from"] = l - 1; step2 | project ["select"], ["from"], i | sort by i asc
Sql: WITH base AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (-5, CAST(-5 AS BIGINT)), (0, CAST(0 AS BIGINT)), (3, CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT))) AS t(i, l)), step1 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, i + 1 AS "select" FROM base), step2 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, l - 1 AS "from" FROM step1) SELECT "select", "from", i FROM step2 ORDER BY i ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | as T1 | summarize s = sum(v) by k | as T2 | extend doubled = s * 2 | join kind=leftouter (T1 | summarize c = count() by k) on k | project k, s, doubled, c | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH T1 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), T2 AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL) SELECT k, s, doubled, c FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.c FROM (SELECT *, s * 2 AS doubled FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS s FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v) GROUP BY ALL)) AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS c FROM T1 GROUP BY ALL) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let nums = datatable(i:int)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 ]; let evens = nums | where i % 2 == 0; let odds = nums | where i % 2 == 1; evens | union odds | summarize total = sum(i), cnt = count() | extend mean = total / cnt
Sql: WITH nums AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4), (5)) AS t(i)), evens AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM nums WHERE (((i) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) = 0), odds AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM nums WHERE (((i) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) = 1) SELECT *, total / cnt AS mean FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(i), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ((SELECT * FROM evens) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * FROM odds)))

Kql: print x = 1 | extend y = x + 1 | extend x = y * 10 | extend z = x + y | project x, y, z
Sql: SELECT x, y, z FROM (SELECT *, x + y AS z FROM (SELECT *, y * 10 AS x FROM (SELECT *, x + 1 AS y FROM (SELECT 1 AS x))))

Kql: datatable(s:string, tag:string)[ "alpha","x", "Beta","x", "café","y", "","z", "O'Brien","x" ] | summarize Column1 = count() by tag | extend Column2 = Column1 + 1 | project Column1, tag, Column2 | sort by tag asc
Sql: SELECT Column1, tag, Column2 FROM (SELECT *, Column1 + 1 AS Column2 FROM (SELECT tag, COUNT(*) AS Column1 FROM (VALUES ('alpha', 'x'), ('Beta', 'x'), ('café', 'y'), ('', 'z'), ('O''Brien', 'x')) AS t(s, tag) GROUP BY ALL)) ORDER BY tag ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let m = materialize(datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | extend w = v * 2); m | join kind=inner (m | where w > 20) on k | project k, v, w, w1 | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH m AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT *, v * 2 AS w FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT k, v, w, w1 FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.v AS v1, R.w AS w1 FROM m AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM m WHERE w > 20) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1, 7,100,3.25 ] | where i > -10 | where i > 0 | where i < 100 | where i != 3 | project i, l | sort by i asc
Sql: SELECT i, l FROM (VALUES (-5, CAST(-5 AS BIGINT), CAST(-5.5 AS DOUBLE)), (0, CAST(0 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)), (3, CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.1 AS DOUBLE)), (7, CAST(100 AS BIGINT), CAST(3.25 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(i, l, r) WHERE i > (-10) AND i > 0 AND i < 100 AND i IS DISTINCT FROM 3 ORDER BY i ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1 ] | where i > 0 | where i < 0 | project i
Sql: SELECT i FROM (VALUES (-5, CAST(-5 AS BIGINT), CAST(-5.5 AS DOUBLE)), (0, CAST(0 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)), (3, CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.1 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(i, l, r) WHERE i > 0 AND i < 0

Kql: let t = datatable(t:datetime, span:timespan)[ datetime(2007-01-01),1d, datetime(2020-06-15 13:45:00),2h ]; let agg = t | summarize mx = max(t), mn = min(t); agg | extend diff = mx - mn | project diff, mx, mn

Kql: datatable(id:long, name:string, score:real)[ 1,"a",1.5, 2,"b",2.5, 3,"c",3.5 ] | extend order = score * 10 | extend group = name | project group, order, id | sort by id asc

Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long)[ 1,100, 2,200, 3,300 ] | extend table = i | extend select = l | extend from = table + select | project table, select, from | sort by table asc
Sql: SELECT "table", "select", "from" FROM (SELECT *, "table" + "select" AS "from" FROM (SELECT *, l AS "select" FROM (SELECT *, i AS "table" FROM (VALUES (1, CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (2, CAST(200 AS BIGINT)), (3, CAST(300 AS BIGINT))) AS t(i, l)))) ORDER BY "table" ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | join kind=inner (datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,100, 2,200 ]) on k | join kind=leftouter (datatable(k:long, z:long)[ 1,1000 ]) on k | project k, v, w, z | sort by k asc
Sql: SELECT k, v, w, z FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k2, R.z FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.w FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(200 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) AS L LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(1000 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, z)) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let x = datatable(n:long)[ 5, 10, 15 ]; let y = x | summarize total = sum(n); let z = toscalar(y); x | extend frac = n * 100 / z | project n, frac | sort by n asc
Sql: WITH x AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(15 AS BIGINT))) AS t(n)), y AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(n), 0) AS total FROM x) SELECT n, frac FROM (SELECT *, n * 100 / (SELECT * FROM y LIMIT 1) AS frac FROM x) ORDER BY n ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(s:string, tag:string)[ "alpha","x", "Beta","x", "café","y", "","z", "O'Brien","x" ] | summarize cnt = count() by tag | top 2 by cnt desc | extend rank = row_number() | project rank, tag, cnt
Sql: SELECT rank, tag, cnt FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rank FROM (SELECT tag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (VALUES ('alpha', 'x'), ('Beta', 'x'), ('café', 'y'), ('', 'z'), ('O''Brien', 'x')) AS t(s, tag) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 2)

Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1, 7,100,3.25 ] | order by r desc | extend cum = row_cumsum(r) | project r, cum

Sql: WITH s AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(4 AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, v)) SELECT g, total, mx FROM (SELECT t.*, _sub.* FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS total, COALESCE(LIST(v) FILTER (WHERE v IS NOT NULL), []) AS lst FROM s GROUP BY ALL) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(lst) AS u(value), LATERAL (SELECT MAX(x) AS mx FROM (SELECT u.value AS x)) AS _sub) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30 ] | partition by k (top 1 by v desc) | sort by k asc, v desc

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 1, 2, 3, 4 ] | extend grp = i % 2 | summarize cnt = count() by grp | join kind=fullouter (datatable(grp:long, label:string)[ 0,"even", 1,"odd" ]) on grp | project grp, cnt, label | sort by grp asc
Sql: SELECT grp, cnt, label FROM (SELECT L.*, R.grp AS grp1, COALESCE(R.label, '') AS label FROM (SELECT grp, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT *, (((i) % NULLIF(2, 0)) + ABS(2)) % NULLIF(2, 0) AS grp FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3), (4)) AS t(i)) GROUP BY ALL) AS L FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(0 AS BIGINT), 'even'), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'odd')) AS t(grp, label)) AS R ON L.grp IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.grp) ORDER BY grp ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let f = datatable(v:long)[ 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 ]; f | summarize p = percentiles(v, 50) | extend tag = "median"
Sql: WITH f AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(5 AS BIGINT))) AS t(v)) SELECT *, 'median' AS tag FROM (SELECT quantile_disc(v, 50 / 100.0) AS p FROM f)

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20, 3,30 ] | extend v = v + 1 | extend v = v * 2 | extend v = v - 5 | summarize sum(v) by k | sort by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(v), 0) AS sum_v FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (v), v - 5 AS v FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (v), v * 2 AS v FROM (SELECT *, v + 1 AS v FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)))) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print n = 10 | extend arr = range(1, n, 1) | mv-expand item = arr to typeof(long) | summarize cnt = count(), total = sum(item)
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(SUM(item), 0) AS total FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS item FROM (SELECT *, GENERATE_SERIES(1, n, 1) AS arr FROM (SELECT 10 AS n)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(arr) AS u(value))

Sql: WITH a AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(0 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(4 AS BIGINT), CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(id, parent)) SELECT id, parent, pparent FROM (SELECT L.*, R.pid, R.pparent FROM a AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT id AS pid, parent AS pparent FROM a) AS R ON L.parent IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.pid) ORDER BY id ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "1", "2", "3" ] | extend num = toint(s) | summarize lst = make_list(num) | extend rev = array_reverse(lst) | project lst, rev
Sql: SELECT lst, rev FROM (SELECT *, LIST_REVERSE(lst) AS rev FROM (SELECT COALESCE(LIST(num) FILTER (WHERE num IS NOT NULL), []) AS lst FROM (SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(s AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(s AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS num FROM (VALUES ('1'), ('2'), ('3')) AS t(s))))

Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1, 7,100,3.25 ] | summarize mn = min(i), mx = max(i), av = avg(r) | extend rng = mx - mn | extend scaled = av * rng
Sql: SELECT *, av * rng AS scaled FROM (SELECT *, mx - mn AS rng FROM (SELECT MIN(i) AS mn, MAX(i) AS mx, COALESCE(AVG(r), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS av FROM (VALUES (-5, CAST(-5 AS BIGINT), CAST(-5.5 AS DOUBLE)), (0, CAST(0 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)), (3, CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.1 AS DOUBLE)), (7, CAST(100 AS BIGINT), CAST(3.25 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(i, l, r)))

Kql: let base = datatable(k:long, v:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b", 3,"c" ]; let pivoted = base | summarize lst = make_list(v); pivoted | extend joined = strcat_array(lst, ",") | project joined
Sql: WITH base AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'c')) AS t(k, v)), pivoted AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT COALESCE(LIST(v) FILTER (WHERE v IS NOT NULL), []) AS lst FROM base) SELECT joined FROM (SELECT *, ARRAY_TO_STRING(lst, ',') AS joined FROM pivoted)

Kql: datatable(id:long, name:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"b" ] | extend tags = pack_array(name, name) | mv-expand tag = tags | summarize cnt = count() by id | sort by id asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT t.*, u.value AS tag FROM (SELECT *, LIST_VALUE(name, name) AS tags FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(id, name)) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(tags) AS u(value)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY id ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | distinct k, v | summarize cnt = count() by k | extend total = toscalar(datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 3 ] | summarize sum(x)) | sort by k asc
Sql: SELECT *, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS sum_x FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) LIMIT 1) AS total FROM (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT DISTINCT k, v FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: print x = dynamic([1, 2, 3]) | mv-expand y = x to typeof(long) | extend y = y * 10 | summarize sum(y), make_list(y)
Sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(y), 0) AS sum_y, COALESCE(LIST(y) FILTER (WHERE y IS NOT NULL), []) AS list_y FROM (SELECT * EXCLUDE (y), y * 10 AS y FROM (SELECT t.*, CAST(u.value AS BIGINT) AS y FROM (SELECT LIST_VALUE(1, 2, 3) AS x) AS t CROSS JOIN UNNEST(x) AS u(value)))

Kql: let outer = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,5, 2,10 ]; let inner = datatable(k:long, w:long)[ 1,7, 1,8, 2,9 ]; outer | join kind=inner (inner | summarize mw = max(w) by k) on k | extend gap = mw - v | project k, v, mw, gap | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH "outer" AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), "inner" AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(7 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(8 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(9 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, w)) SELECT k, v, mw, gap FROM (SELECT *, mw - v AS gap FROM (SELECT L.*, R.k AS k1, R.mw FROM "outer" AS L INNER JOIN (SELECT k, MAX(w) AS mw FROM "inner" GROUP BY ALL) AS R ON L.k IS NOT DISTINCT FROM R.k)) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(t:datetime)[ datetime(2020-01-01), datetime(2020-02-15), datetime(2020-03-20) ] | extend month = startofmonth(t) | summarize cnt = count() by month | order by month asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT month, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM (SELECT *, DATE_TRUNC('month', t) AS month FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '2020-02-15 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '2020-03-20 00:00:00')) AS t(t)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY month ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(i:int, l:long, r:real)[ -5,-5,-5.5, 0,0,0.0, 3,2147483648,0.1, 7,100,3.25 ] | extend bucket = bin(r, 1.0) | summarize cnt = count(), avg_i = avg(i) by bucket | sort by bucket asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(AVG(i), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS avg_i FROM (SELECT *, FLOOR((r)/(1.0))*(1.0) AS bucket FROM (VALUES (-5, CAST(-5 AS BIGINT), CAST(-5.5 AS DOUBLE)), (0, CAST(0 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)), (3, CAST(2147483648 AS BIGINT), CAST(0.1 AS DOUBLE)), (7, CAST(100 AS BIGINT), CAST(3.25 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(i, l, r)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY bucket ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: let z = datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 2,20 ]; z | extend Column1 = k, Column2 = v | summarize Column1 = sum(Column1), Column2 = sum(Column2) | project Column1, Column2
Sql: WITH z AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) SELECT Column1, Column2 FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Column1), 0) AS Column1, COALESCE(SUM(Column2), 0) AS Column2 FROM (SELECT *, k AS Column1, v AS Column2 FROM z))
